across.clue: Broad means that something is wide, not narrow.
An apology is what people say to show that they are sorry.
A jungle is a type of forest in a warm, rainy tropical area, where trees and plants grow very close together.
a piece of art that consists of several different objects or pictures arranged to produce a particular effect
A principle is a belief about the correct way to behave.
To ignore something is to act like you do not see or hear it.
A pancake is a thin, flat cake made from batter and fried.

down.clue: A couch is a long, soft seat that many people can sit on.
Courage is the feeling of not being afraid.
A refrigerator is a large electrical machine used to keep food cold.
To discourage is to make someone feel less excited about something.
A column is a tall, vertical post often used to support a building.
Preferring one person thing or idea to another in a way that is unfair.
If something is medieval, it comes from the period between 650 and 1500 CE.
a man whose job is to look after the passengers on a plane train or ship especially serving them with food and drink.
Provide a response | Give sb an ___
If someone is fluent in a language, then they are able to speak it very well.
A dish is a type of food that is cooked in a particular way.
